payload.answer: Recall prefers active, non-superseded memory. mem_new matched Sam and Goldman after normalization, including punctuation-insensitive matching, so it was eligible for return. mem_old was excluded because it is not current: it conflicts with or has been replaced by mem_new and is explicitly treated as superseded. This prevents Brain from presenting outdated information as current.
payload.decision: Recall returned the newer active memory card for Sam at Goldman and excluded the older card because it was marked superseded during conflict resolution.

entity_resolution.reason: Recall matched the same person/entity and normalized the Goldman reference despite punctuation or formatting variation, so both cards were considered about the same subject.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new is the active memory for Sam associated with Goldman.
mem_old was filtered because it is an older conflicting card that has been superseded by mem_new.

details: Normalized organization reference for Goldman despite punctuation/format differences.
Selected mem_new because it is the current active card.
Filtered mem_old because its status is superseded.

repair_options: If mem_old should still be recallable, remove or revise its superseded status.
If Sam or Goldman were incorrectly merged due to punctuation normalization, split the entities and rerun recall.
If both memories should remain valid, store them as time-scoped facts instead of marking one superseded.

This prevents Brain from presenting outdated information as current.","citations":["mem_new","mem_old"],"repair_options":["If mem_old should still be recallable, remove or revise its superseded status.","If Sam or Goldman were incorrectly merged due to punctuation normalization, split the entities and rerun recall.","If both memories should remain valid, store them as time-scoped facts instead of marking one superseded."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Matched query subject to Sam.","Normalized organization reference for Goldman despite punctuation/format differences.","Selected mem_new because it is the current active card.","Filtered mem_old because its status is superseded."]}}
